title: Cool Cat vs Dirty Dog: The Virus Wars
original_title: Cool Cat vs Dirty Dog 'The Virus Wars'
overview: Cool Cat loves to protect kids, but Dirty Dog hates children. Mad because Coronavirus is fading away, Dirty Dog makes his own virus to infect the kids – the Dirty Dog Virus! But the virus becomes a national threat, and Cool Cat must stop it to save the kids! Can Cool Cat stop Dirty Dog and save your life?
